Whispering Winds

Prepare for a slice of stealthy action!

Join Hikaru, a fearless samurai, on a thrilling 5x3 slot adventure in Play’n GO’s latest action slot, Whispering Winds. Hikaru’s mission is not for the faint of heart... they’re trying to steal the sacred treasures of the Fujimato Dynasty – the legendary sword, mirror, and jewel.

Face off against Takeshi, the dynasty’s loyal guardian – in a battle of skill and strategy. Navigate perilous encounters and overcome Takeshi to unlock the emperor’s treasure chamber.

Are you ready to embark on your mission?

Action, Asian

Game Theme:

Game Type:

Video Slot

Released on:

11 Jul 2024

Play game for FREE

Desktop Screenshot

Mobile Screenshot

FEATURES

Sharpen your combat skills with these features...

Land three or more standard symbols with Hikaru to secure a standard win against Takeshi.

Free Spins and Mega Symbols
As the battle progresses, you can unleash the power of the Free Spins feature by landing three or more Scatters. This activates five spins with a colossal 3x3 Mega Symbol that roams the reels, increasing your chances of striking it rich. The Mega Symbol can transform into a Gold Coin or a Scatter, bringing more blocks, parries and clean swipes into the gameplay.

But that’s not all... land a Gold Coin during the Free Spins, and you’ll start with nine cash symbols instead of the minimum three. Hit a Scatter, and you’ll secure an extra five Free Spins, extending your quest for the Fujimato Dynasty’s sacred treasures.

With the potential for unlimited excitement and bountiful rewards, Hikaru’s journey to claim the king’s riches awaits you. What are you waiting for?

Bonus Round
Put your skills to the test in the Bonus Round, where the challenge is high, and the rewards are even higher. Triggered by landing six gold coins, this Hold & Win feature grants you three spins.

Each coin resets the spin counter to three, keeping the thrill alive. Fill the entire screen with coins to seize an additional prize of x1000 your stake and outsmart Takeshi once and for all and seize his riches...

Head to the armoury and ready up!
Shop now
